title: Import Context
description: Fetch a GitHub PR, Jira issues, and Confluence pages into prompt attachments.

placeholders.jiraKeys: Type a Jira key and press Enter
placeholders.confluencePageIds: Type a page ID and press Enter

messages.partialDescription: {{successCount}} succeeded, {{failedCount}} failed. Check the failed items.
messages.requestFailedDescription: There was a problem communicating with the server. Please try again shortly.
messages.confirmFailedDescription: Run preview first to generate context text.
messages.savedDescription: The previewed context was added as an attachment.
messages.duplicateJira: That Jira key is already in the list.
messages.duplicateConfluence: That Confluence page ID is already in the list.

errors.emptySources: Enter at least one source before previewing.
